35.reason: This line incorrectly outputs the second endpoint of the first segment instead of computing the longest continuous line. It always prints the x2 coordinate twice and y2, which for the test case gives "13 13 13" instead of the correct "2 12 12". The program lacks any logic to find connected segments and count them.
